case_title: DAVID A LANE VS. WUNDER BREWING COMPANY,INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANE, DAVID A AS TO DEFENDANT WUNDER BREWING COMPANY,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANE, DAVID A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WUNDER BREWING COMPANY,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $25,010.28 PRINCIPAL, $160.13 INTEREST, $325.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,495.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
